subject: Welcome to the Millvale Youth Baseball list
body: Thanks for joining the Millvale Youth Baseball mailing list — here's this season's schedule.

subject: Your invoice is ready
body: Invoice #1042 is attached. Let me know if anything is off.

subject: Practice schedule update
body: Practice moved to Thursday at 5:30 this week — the field was too wet before.

subject: News from the shop
body: Here's what's new at the shop this month — fresh cutting boards and a few custom orders.

subject: Cutting board ready
body: Your walnut cutting board is finished and ready to pick up at the shop.

subject: Game reminder
body: Reminder — game at 10am tomorrow at the Millvale field.

subject: Practice this Saturday
body: Bring your glove — practice is at 9am Saturday.

subject: Your drawing on the workbench
body: Grandpa's framing your crayon drawing from the workbench.

subject: Registration confirmed
body: You're all set for the season — see you at the field.

subject: Weekend plans
body: Grilling brats Saturday if the weather holds — come by the garage.

subject: Craft fair invitation
body: We'll have a booth at the Millvale Makers Market — stop by and say hello.

subject: New in the shop
body: Just finished a fresh batch of walnut cutting boards — take a look.

subject: Roster update needed
body: Send me any roster changes before Saturday's game.

subject: Thanks
body: Thanks for the cherry for the raffle birdhouse. I owe you one.

subject: St. Nicholas raffle
body: Can the shop donate a cutting board for the St. Nicholas raffle this year?
